inputs.value: Create an outstanding high-end digital cartoon illustration of an anthropomorphic female rabbit with a thik human body and cuvy rabbit features, huge buts, squatting confidently in a stylish three-quarter pose with one hand on her hip and the other gently touching a long upright ear, featuring expressive amber eyes, long eyelashes, a soft white muzzle, a small pink rabbit nose, and a playful yet sophisticated smile; her luxurious cream and light-brown fur is finely detailed around the ears, cheeks, arms, and fluffy tail, while her graceful athletic figure is dressed in a fitted beige turtleneck sweater tucked into high-waisted dark-brown tailored shorts with a premium leather belt, complemented by knee-high boots and subtle gold accessories; the scene is set against a rich warm chocolate-brown background with smooth gradients, soft studio spotlighting, and elegant decorative shapes that enhance the composition without distraction; rendered in a premium Disney-inspired digital cartoon style with crisp clean linework, flawless anatomy, vibrant yet refined colors, detailed fur textures, cinematic lighting, smooth cel shading blended with painterly rendering, dynamic character design, professional concept-art quality, sharp focus, and stunning 4K masterpiece-level detail.
